name: Taiwan FamilyMart Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan FamilyMart Co., Ltd. operates various convenience stores in Taiwan and internationally. The company engages in the provision of warehouse tally services; electronic information services; system integrated services; sales and services of computer software and related equipment; logistics activities; manufacturing of food; and trucking, staffing, and packaging services. In addition, it wholesales and retails books and magazines, and household merchandise. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 3,548 stores in Taiwan; and 2,801 stores in China. Taiwan FamilyMart Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
